code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    if not triples:
        return ""
    # Group triples by subject to allow multiple entities
    from collections import defaultdict
    subject_map = defaultdict(list)
    for t in triples:
        subject_map[t.subject].append(t)

    # Simple predicate → phrase templates
    templates = {
        # Airport specific
        "cityServed": "serves the city of {obj}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": "is situated {obj} metres above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": "is situated {obj} feet above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": "is situated {obj} metres above sea level",
        "runwayLength": "has a runway length of {obj} metres",
        "runwayName": "its runway is named {obj}",
        "location": "is located in {obj}",
        "operatingOrganisation": "is operated by {obj}",
        "country": "is in {obj}",
        "isPartOf": "is part of {obj}",
        "icaoLocationIdentifier": "ICAO code is {obj}",
        "locationIdentifier": "location identifier is {obj}",
        "iataLocationIdentifier": "IATA code is {obj}",
        # Runway details
        "1stRunwayLengthFeet": "the first runway is {obj} feet long",
        "1stRunwayLengthMetre": "the first runway is {obj} metres long",
        "2ndRunwayLengthFeet": "the second runway is {obj} feet long",
        "2ndRunwayLengthMetre": "the second runway is {obj} metres long",
        "3rdRunwayLengthFeet": "the third runway is {obj} feet long",
        "3rdRunwayLengthMetre": "the third runway is {obj} metres long",
        "4thRunwayLengthFeet": "the fourth runway is {obj} feet long",
        "4thRunwayLengthMetre": "the fourth runway is {obj} metres long",
        "5thRunwayLengthFeet": "the fifth runway is {obj} feet long",
        "5thRunwayLengthMetre": "the fifth runway is {obj} metres long",
        "1stRunwaySurfaceType": "the first runway surface is {obj}",
        "2ndRunwaySurfaceType": "the second runway surface is {obj}",
        "3rdRunwaySurfaceType": "the third runway surface is {obj}",
        "4thRunwaySurfaceType": "the fourth runway surface is {obj}",
        "5thRunwaySurfaceType": "the fifth runway surface is {obj}",
        "runwaySurfaceType": "the runway surface is {obj}",
        "1stRunwayNumber": "the first runway number is {obj}",
        "2ndRunwayNumber": "the second runway number is {obj}",
        "3rdRunwayNumber": "the third runway number is {obj}",
        "4thRunwayNumber": "the fourth runway number is {obj}",
        "5thRunwayNumber": "the fifth runway number is {obj}",
        # Leadership / political
        "leader": "leader name is {obj}",
        "leaderParty": "leader party is {obj}",
        "leaderTitle": "leader title is {obj}",
        "mayor": "mayor is {obj}",
        "chief": "chief is {obj}",
        "capital": "capital is {obj}",
        "language": "language is {obj}",
        "officialLanguage": "official language is {obj}",
        "demonym": "demonym is {obj}",
        # Administrative
        # "country": "country is {obj}",  # duplicate entry removed; use earlier definition
        "isPartOf": "is part of {obj}",
        "administrativeArrondissement": "administrative arrondissement is {obj}",
        "jurisdiction": "jurisdiction is {obj}",
        "largestCity": "largest city is {obj}",
        "countySeat": "county seat is {obj}",
        "postalCode": "postal code is {obj}",
        "areaCode": "area code is {obj}",
        "ceremonialCounty": "ceremonial county is {obj}",
        # Organizational
        "owner": "owner is {obj}",
        "operatingOrganisation": "operating organisation is {obj}",
        "hubAirport": "hub airport is {obj}",
        "regionServed": "serves region {obj}",
        "headquarter": "headquarter is {obj}",
        # Identification
        "nativeName": "native name is {obj}",
        "class": "class is {obj}",
        "division": "division is {obj}",
        "order": "order is {obj}",
        "species": "species is {obj}",
        # Misc
        "currency": "currency is {obj}",
        "foundingYear": "founded in {obj}",
        "founder": "founded by {obj}",
        # Fallback for any other predicate
    }

    sentences = []
    for subject, tlist in subject_map.items():
        # Gather predicate→object map for special combined handling
        pred_obj = {t.predicate: t.object.strip('"') for t in tlist}
        # If both owner and operatingOrganisation are present and no other predicates,
        # produce a concise combined sentence.
        if "owner" in pred_obj and "operatingOrganisation" in pred_obj and len(pred_obj) == 2:
            sentence = f"The {subject}, which is owned by {pred_obj['owner']}, is operated by {pred_obj['operatingOrganisation']}."
            sentences.append(sentence)
            continue
        # If there is exactly one triple and it is a simple quantitative predicate,
        # produce a more natural standalone sentence.
        if len(tlist) == 1:
            t = tlist[0]
            obj = t.object.strip('"')
            if t.predicate == "runwayLength":
                sentence = f"The runway length of {subject} is {obj} metres."
                sentences.append(sentence)
                continue
            elif t.predicate == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel":
                sentence = f"The elevation of {subject} is {obj} metres above sea level."
                sentences.append(sentence)
                continue
            elif t.predicate == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet":
                sentence = f"The elevation of {subject} is {obj} feet above sea level."
                sentences.append(sentence)
                continue
            elif t.predicate == "cityServed":
                sentence = f"{subject} serves the city of {obj}."
                sentences.append(sentence)
                continue
        # General case: build clause list
        parts = []
        for t in tlist:
            obj_raw = t.object.strip('"')
            # Special handling for country predicate
            if t.predicate == "country":
                parts.append(f"{subject} is in the country of {obj_raw}")
                continue
            # Special handling for official language predicate
            if t.predicate == "officialLanguage":
                parts.append(f"{obj_raw} is the official language of {subject}")
                continue
            # Special handling for language predicate
            if t.predicate == "language":
                parts.append(f"{obj_raw} is spoken in {subject}")
                continue
            # Special handling for capital predicate
            if t.predicate == "capital":
                parts.append(f"The capital of {subject} is {obj_raw}")
                continue
            # Special handling for runway surface type predicates (e.g., 4thRunwaySurfaceType)
            if t.predicate.endswith("RunwaySurfaceType"):
                # Extract ordinal prefix (e.g., "4th")
                ordinal = t.predicate.split("Runway")[0]
                # Normalise object (e.g., "Asphalt" -> "asphalt")
                surface = obj_raw.lower()
                parts.append(f"The {ordinal} runway at {subject} is made of {surface}")
                continue
            tmpl = templates.get(t.predicate)
            if tmpl:
                obj = obj_raw
                parts.append(tmpl.format(obj=obj))
            else:
                pred = t.predicate.replace('_', ' ')
                obj = obj_raw
                parts.append(f"{pred} {obj}")
        # Combine parts into a fluent sentence
        if parts:
            if len(parts) == 1:
                sentence = f"{subject} {parts[0]}."
            else:
                sentence = f"{subject} " + ", ".join(parts[:-1]) + ", and " + parts[-1] + "."
            sentences.append(sentence)

    return " ".join(sentences)

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
